{{Quote|However, I remain a gracious host to leave you in the company of my favorite gladiator droid. I hope you find it as entertaining as I have over the years.|[[Xizor/Legends|Prince Xizor]]|<ref name="Shadows">[[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire (video game)|''Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire'' video game]]</ref>}}
The '''[[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] gladiator droid''' was a gargatuan [[Droid/Legends|droid]] model used by [[Xizor/Legends|Xizor]] as a sentry droid in his [[Xizor's Palace|palace]]. The droid was divided into three parts: lower body, torso, and head. It could not be destroyed easily, as all the sections were capable of operating independently.

{{Droid-stub}}
